title: Cut Tall Grass│剪芒草
description: Use shears to snip an entire tall grass or large fern and obtain it.│使用剪刀剪下芒草或者大型蕨類可獲得它。
body:
# Function│功能
1. Using scissors to cut a tall grass or large fern will drop the plant itself instead of two short grass or ferns.│使用剪刀剪掉一株芒草或大型蕨類，會掉落植物本身，而不是兩株矮草或小型蕨類。
2. When not using scissors to cut a tall grass or large fern, the seed drop probability is 25% (12.5% ​​for vanilla), because it's like destroying two short grass or ferns at once.│當不使用剪刀剪掉芒草或大型蕨類時，種子掉落機率為25%（原版為12.5%），因為這就像摧毀兩株矮草或小型蕨類。
3. One tall grass or large fern can be crafted into two short grass or ferns.(recipe)│一棵芒草或大型蕨類可以製作成兩株矮草或小型蕨類。‎（配方）

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
